title: Lemon Garlic Chicken & Barley Bowl
description: Fresh, high-protein bowl with lemony chicken, barley, and greens.
ingredients: 1.5 lb chicken breast, cubed or sliced
instructions: Marinate 1.5 lb chicken in 2 tbsp lemon juice, 1 tbsp olive oil, 2 minced garlic cloves, and 1 tsp oregano for at least 30 minutes.
Cook chicken in a skillet until golden and cooked through.
Whisk 1 tbsp tahini, 1 tsp maple syrup, 1 tsp soy sauce, and a splash of water for dressing.
Assemble bowls with 2 cups cooked barley, 1 cup edamame, 1 cup shredded carrot, and 2 cups arugula. Top with chicken and drizzle dressing.
notes: Great for meal prep; keeps well for next-day lunch.
